purpose: Tool-neutral image prompts for project-level Shen Weisang, Yan Nanzhi, and Shen Zhaomian character reference boards.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Do not create a new personal crest for Shen Weisang or Yan Nanzhi. Shen Weisang is a human remnant under Suming rule, so no visible old-empire insignia may appear on his clothing, armor pieces, cloak, bow case, pouch exterior, belt front, or background; his relay token is hidden inside a plain unmarked pouch. Yan Nanzhi may use inherited Zhaoming language only in the old empire formal reveal state or as concealed proof-object logic.
must_have: Shen Weisang must read as a 17-year-old lean hunter and guide
Yan Nanzhi must read as an unmistakably female 18-year-old trained aristocratic fugitive of breathtaking cold noble beauty
three states must preserve one continuous identity
clothing must stay complete, fitted, functional, and role-specific
low magic must remain small and local
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
Shen Zhaomian must read as an 8-10-year-old child in every state, not a teenager or adult
shared_rules.negative_prompt: adult warlord, king, prince, general, knight armor, heroic armor, palace costume, masculine female, androgynous model, broad jaw, thick neck, wide shoulders, heavy male hands, male boots-and-robe silhouette, clean full badge, new personal emblem, visible old-empire insignia on Shen Weisang, sun mark, moon mark, crescent mark, compass medallion, full Zhaoming crest on chest, shoulder emblem, cloak emblem, pouch emblem, bow-case emblem, belt-front emblem, banner, spell circle, large glowing wings, angel wings, superhero aura, beggar rags, shredded clothes, full-body mud, unreadable refugee silhouette, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, over-saturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi, adult Shen Zhaomian, teenage Shen Zhaomian, horror victim child, sexualized child, cute mascot child, redesigned Qingming badge, new Shen Zhaomian crest

input_images.role: locked Shen Weisang costume states reference; preserve silhouette, clothing logic, and prop hang-points

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Shen Weisang from the series Severed Homeland. Use the visible project references and preserve the existing Shen Weisang costume-board logic, but remove every visible old-empire badge or insignia from his clothing and equipment. Shen Weisang is a 17-year-old human remnant under Suming rule, so he would not openly wear any Zhaoming sun, moon, crescent, compass, medallion, official order, or old-empire mark. The board shows the same 17-year-old lean hunter and guide in three continuous states: 1) Canyang Ao hunter state before the fire, clean but worn grey-brown short hunter layers with washed herb-green inner garment, old leather wrist guards, bow, quiver, trap cord, route pouch, water bag, short knife; 2) post-fire fugitive state with the same silhouette, smoke-dulled cloth, localized charred lower hem, shoulder and elbow repair stitching, lighter route pack, no ragged destruction; 3) border snowline state with grey hemp cloak, old leather shoulder protection, wrapped lower legs, snow dust, still clearly a hunter and not a soldier. Include detail panels for youthful guarded face, left-shoulder asymmetry and old injury, belt and route system, back view with bow and quiver, charred hem stitching, and a plain unmarked leather pouch that hides the half relay token completely. The pouch exterior must have only stitching, leather wear, cord knots, soot, and scratches, with no sun, moon, crescent, compass, medallion, crest, or badge mark. Preserve the gold-red dark pattern as abstract bloodline and half-formed martial-vein residue. Show two behaviors: dormant marks are faint dark-gold cracks, old seam thread, route-surveyor memory lines, scar residue, and ember stitching; activated marks briefly light from within as warm gold-red cracks when a short old-relay spell trigger or half-formed border-wall martial vein activates. Put the activated glow only in close detail panels near one eye, one shoulder-blade or left-shoulder area, hidden inner garment seam, and charred hem edge. These marks must never form a faction symbol. Keep all clothing complete, fitted, practical, and role-specific. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic cloth, leather, soot, frost, old wood and stone mood, restrained cinematic lighting. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: adult warlord, mature king, prince, general, knight, heroic armor, military officer armor, palace costume, clean full Zhaoming badge, new personal crest, visible old-empire insignia, sun mark, moon mark, crescent mark, compass mark, medallion, official order, crest, shoulder emblem, chest emblem, cloak emblem, pouch emblem, bow-case emblem, belt-front emblem, full sun-moon emblem on chest or cloak, gold-red pattern shaped like a badge, gold-red pattern shaped like a compass, banner, divine aura, large wings, angel wings, spell circle, high fantasy magic blast, glowing whole body, shredded clothing, beggar rags, full-body mud, zombie refugee, unreadable silhouette, modern tactical gear, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Yan Nanzhi from the series Severed Homeland. Important correction: Yan Nanzhi must be unmistakably female and breathtakingly beautiful, a cold noble 18-year-old young woman whose beauty is impossible to ignore. Do not follow any masculine face, male shoulder, or male robe-body proportions from the costume reference. Use the references for costume system, colors, props, materials, and symbol rules only; redesign the body and face as a stunning female aristocratic fugitive. She has a refined oval face, delicate jawline, luminous guarded eyes, elegant nose and lips, long black hair tied with a red cord, long graceful neck, narrow shoulders, slim waist, elegant feminine body line under full clothing, and slender graceful hands. The board shows the same beautiful 18-year-old woman in three continuous states: 1) fugitive concealment travel state, mist-purple or cold-grey clean coarse travel robe over a feminine silhouette, deep ink-blue inner structure, black hair tied with a red cord, controlled upright posture, hidden moon-white jade and blood-writ packet carried close to the body in an inner pouch or small black lacquer case, no visible Sun-Moon badge on the front layer; 2) old empire formal reveal state for memory or identity reveal only, elegant female Ming-style Hanfu reference with vermilion wide sleeves, royal blue or peacock-blue layered front, moon-white inner garment, slender waist structure, worn gold embroidery, old silk folds, dark inherited sun-moon pattern language copied from the locked Zhaoming references but not redesigned as a new emblem; 3) border snowline state with dark grey cloak over the same feminine fugitive structure, snow dust, hidden moon-white lining visible only as a brief inner edge, red hair cord subdued but present, proof objects still concealed. Include detail panels for the stunning 18-year-old female face, black hair and red cord, collar and inner-pocket hiding system, graceful hands protecting an old paper packet, moon-white jade fragment and black lacquer case, formal worn-gold embroidery with inherited sun-moon dark pattern, and snowline cloak clasp with hidden lining. Keep all clothing complete, fitted, dignified, and role-specific; beautiful but not exposed, regal but not modern princess styling. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic silk, coarse travel cloth, leather, old paper, moon-white jade, snow and worn gold, restrained cinematic lighting. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.

input_images.role: locked Shen Zhaomian family-object reference for burnt hair cord, small herb pouch, and insect-wax ring hint

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Shen Zhaomian from the series Severed Homeland, matching the existing project character-board format: three full-body states across the top, compact detail panels below, and material swatches at the bottom, with no visible labels or readable text. Shen Zhaomian is Shen Weisang's 8-10-year-old younger sister: child proportions, small face, thin child wrists, quick village-child movement, and a memory for herb names. The board shows the same child in three continuous states: 1) village herb-child state with light grey short ru or simple village garment, herb-green small apron or tied skirt, simple cloth shoes, small herb pouch, plain hair cord, anxious but lively expression; 2) post-fire missing-child anchor state with the same silhouette, smoke-dulled light grey cloth, tiny soot edges, burnt brown hair cord, small herb pouch still present or just dropped, faint wrist identification trace, frightened shoulders but no torture spectacle and clothing still complete; 3) Qingming Court child-white identifier state with clean Qingming white child robe, narrow sleeves, pale insect-wax identification ring on one wrist, unnervingly quiet posture, retained burnt hair cord and small herb pouch as family-memory anchors. Include detail panels for child face age lock, burnt hair cord, small herb-green pouch, blank herb-name wooden tags with no writing, wrist insect-wax ring, white child-robe cuff, light-grey village cloth, herb-green apron fabric, and Qingming insect-wax material. Do not redesign any faction badge. Do not create a new personal crest, child crest, Qingming logo, Sun-Moon emblem, black-sun badge, or decorative faction mark. Identity is carried by the white robe, insect-wax ring, herb pouch, and burnt hair cord, not by visible badges. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic cloth, old wood, dry herbs, insect-wax, restrained color, production reference board, mobile-vertical readable. Emotional direction: family-memory wound and bureaucratic institutional coldness, not horror.
